rationale: The citing paper mentions Park, Ding, and Rao (2008) only in its background review of methods for handling many attributes and in a summary table of prior approaches. The citation is used to note that an incentive-aligned upgrading method exists and to position ASE within the broader method landscape. The paper does not build its model, estimation procedure, hypotheses, or empirical comparisons around that specific method, so the role is mainly contextual rather than functionally central.
